basics.name: Reza Babaei
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building and scaling web and mobile products at large scale. Strong background in React, React Native, Node.js, and distributed systems, with a focus on performance, reliability, and shipping production-ready features end-to-end. Quick to ramp on new languages and internal tooling. Contributed to platform modules serving 10M+ MAU and built offline-first systems supporting mission-critical global operations under unreliable connectivity.

highlights: Led development of mission-critical mobile and web workflows used by global field teams operating in low-connectivity environments
Collaborated with product stakeholders to define requirements and deliver scalable, production-grade features
Designed and implemented offline-first synchronization using SQLite and background workers, with retry logic and sync-state tracking for unreliable networks.
Reduced p99 latency from ~3s to <500ms through performance optimization across JavaScript and native layers (Java/Swift/Objective-C)
Improved release reliability through containerized Azure + Docker CI/CD pipelines and safer rollout processes
Built and maintained full-stack web and mobile features for a 50k+ user event platform, supporting high traffic during peak festival periods
Worked closely with product and design to implement performant user experiences across Next.js and React Native clients
Led AWS serverless migration (Lambda, API Gateway), reducing infra cost ~50% and latency ~35%
Designed caching and asset delivery strategies for map-heavy workloads, improving startup time ~25% and reducing peak memory usage ~40%
Developed TypeScript SDK and client platform modules powering social products with 10M+ monthly active users
Built core client-side modules for caching, reactive state management, and real-time event handling
Improved GraphQL schema consistency and API design for cleaner data flows, reducing partner integration effort ~60%
Collaborated across product and platform teams to improve release quality and system reliability
Architected high-availability platforms with sub-second API latency and optimized backend performance with Redis caching
Implemented CI/CD pipelines to improve deployment reliability and release velocity
Led a team of 5 engineers on a video platform serving 10k+ daily users, reducing backend latency from ~800ms to ~200ms
Built and scaled e-commerce and marketing web products using Next.js/React and Laravel backends
